title: ASR Outdoor Complete 40pc Deluxe Rockhounding Kit with Geology Tools
description:
If rock hounding, gem hunting or finding fossils are your outdoor hobby or keen geological interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits and sorting material, to cleaning and examining your newfound precious metals, rocks, minerals, fossils, gems and more, this ASR Outdoor 13pc Deluxe Geology Gem Mining Rockhounding Tools Kit has you covered from start to finish

ASR Outdoor Complete 40pc Deluxe Rockhounding Kit with Geology Tools

If rock hounding, gem hunting or finding fossils are your outdoor hobby or keen geological interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field!

All the included geology equipment and tools fit inside the spacious 16-inch heavy duty, 600D rip-stop nylon tool bag that is constructed with super tough, tear-resistant fabric for the strength and durability to carry your tools and haul out your found treasures and specimens. Featuring durable, heavy duty stitching with a large storage compartment, specifically designed for treasure hunting in all climates; our ASR Outdoor Deluxe Tool Bag will last you many seasons over an ordinary canvas equipment bag that will break a zipper and disintegrate in front of you.

Key Features

  • DELUXE ROCKHOUNDING TOOLS KIT: 40pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered!
  • ESSENTIAL ROCK HAMMER: A must have, this 20oz hammer features rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material
  • ROCKHOUNDING ACCESSORIES: Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any new found materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe
  • DELUXE NYLON TOTE BAG: The deluxe nylon tool bag makes it easy to carry all your rockhounding tools to and from your field site, keeping everything organized; the tool bag features convenient side pockets, a durable lower compartment and large middle compartment

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTGEOKIT9
  • UPC: 810058486561
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 40 Total Pieces

This rockhounding tools kit includes the following components:
Compact 2-in-1 shovel with pick; 20oz rock pick hammer; 3pc cold chisel set
6-inch coarse classifier rock screen; hand trowel with depth markers; mineral brushes
Big beam LED-UV black light flashlight; aluminum collection jars with display lid
Specimen identification mat; assorted clear specimen bags; magnification eye loupe; gem tweezers
Adjustable safety goggles; universal fit canvas work gloves; microfiber dust/debris rag.

You need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field. If rock hounding and fossil hunting are your new hobby or a gift you are looking to give to create a passionate hobby or new, rewarding interest, you've found a curated collection that covers all your bases: breaking up deposits, collecting and sorting material, to cleaning and examining new found precious gems, rocks, minerals, and fossils

Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, for jade in Big Sur, California or fossils in Wyoming, this rockhounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck!
